If you think carefully, some teams can one shot your whole team so the revive wheel is useless

You trigger revive but it's delayed, if they kill your team you lose even when the revive is in delayed state
Celeste is reviving everyone at 1 hp with delayed heal
So anyone can just AoE dmg and kill your whole squad that got revived
Doll and Tawil are the main ones if you want the unit to be alive after, the others are kinda more for popping them back up to ult or block an attack
Celeste can be annoying in 1 vs 4 tho with reinforce + her 1 cost dmg scaling per allies dead
Cassiah is RNG and is not everytimes reliable
You sometimes want cleanse rather than revive

It will apply the effect first then the exalt effects but sometimes depending on the wheel the enemy have or the debuff you have on yourself, you can't use the wheel effect
Entwine is a debuff that disable your wheel effect until the end of the turn or you cleanse it

People don't often use it because there are some team that can wipe your whole team without needing wheel effects or they use stuff like doll or tinct to cleanse the debuff before using the wheel effects
You just need to understand what your team weakness is
And focus on the one that can disable your team
So that way you can 1 vs 4

<@332573289438380032> any advice for draft pick? or does no one care about that?

- Check relic
- Check units
- Check WoD
- See if there is some combo between units + WoD or units + units
- Sometimes the combo can get bricked by the relic
- Posse are situational, but some are extremely good to have stuff like stagnation 3 pierce or void
- Aim for counterpick, If the enemy take strike based unit then you take para posse stuff like that
- Based on the relic you change your playstyle, for example you got the relic that reshuffle your hand every turns, you discards all of your high cost wheel if you have more than 2 or 3 in starting hand
